answers: VR = immersive digital experience. Wear a headset and feel like you are inside a 3D world. Gaming, training, therapy.
Best headsets: Meta Quest 3 (standalone, affordable), PlayStation VR2 (gaming), Apple Vision Pro (mixed reality, premium).
VR uses: gaming, education, medical training, virtual tourism, architecture visualization, therapy for phobias/PTSD.
VR basics: needs headset with display + tracking. Standalone (Quest) or PC-connected (Valve Index) options available.
